race.comment: STROBING (5) is capable on his day and progressing nicely this prep. Big drop in grade when sat on the speed for a courageous second over 1812m at Port Macquarie with the 61kg. Gets a similar run today and is ready to break through. BEEARETEE (9) is heading in the right direction as he gets out to his right trip. Got the prize two back, then sat on the speed with a plugging third over 1600m at this track. Has further improvement to come and is expected to take a hand in the finish. QUEEN OF TAYRONA (11) on the back-up for this fifth-up and expected to get a better run. Assess on her solid rating third two-back at Coffs Harbour. AUTUMN HEIR (8) resumed over 1600m at Taree last start and finished 5 lengths away in fourth. Fitter and well placed.
